name: crossing_approach
promptSpec:
Process crossing_approach(train_dist, gate_pos, fault) -> (cmd, alarm)

FSF specification:
if (fault gt 0) => cmd eq 0 && alarm eq 2
if (train_dist le 3 && gate_pos ge 2) => cmd eq 2 && alarm eq 1
if (train_dist le 3 && gate_pos eq 1) => cmd eq 1 && alarm eq 1
if (train_dist ge 8 && gate_pos eq 0) => cmd eq 3 && alarm eq 0
others => cmd eq 0 && alarm eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Railway crossing controller industrial trial (Mitsubishi); FSF reconstruction of approach/clear/fault priority

name: crossing_clear_check

fsfScenarios.test: occupancy eq 0 && gate_pos eq 0 && timer ge 2

promptSpec:
Process crossing_clear_check(occupancy, gate_pos, timer) -> (permit, status)

FSF specification:
if (occupancy gt 0) => permit eq 0 && status eq 2
if (gate_pos gt 0) => permit eq 0 && status eq 1
if (timer lt 2) => permit eq 0 && status eq 1
if (occupancy eq 0 && gate_pos eq 0 && timer ge 2) => permit eq 1 && status eq 0
others => permit eq 0 && status eq 0

name: route_lock

fsfScenarios.test: route_req gt 0 && conflict eq 0 && point_ok gt 0

promptSpec:
Process route_lock(route_req, conflict, point_ok) -> (locked, reject)

FSF specification:
if (conflict gt 0) => locked eq 0 && reject eq 2
if (point_ok eq 0) => locked eq 0 && reject eq 1
if (route_req gt 0 && conflict eq 0 && point_ok gt 0) => locked eq 1 && reject eq 0
others => locked eq 0 && reject eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Casco interlocking route-lock decision (published SOFL case); conflict preempts lock

name: signal_aspect
promptSpec:
Process signal_aspect(route_locked, block_clear, override) -> (aspect, restrict)

FSF specification:
if (override gt 0) => aspect eq 0 && restrict eq 1
if (route_locked eq 0) => aspect eq 0 && restrict eq 1
if (route_locked gt 0 && block_clear eq 0) => aspect eq 1 && restrict eq 1
if (route_locked gt 0 && block_clear gt 0) => aspect eq 2 && restrict eq 0
others => aspect eq 0 && restrict eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Signal aspect selection under lock/block/override priority

name: point_move_permit

fsfScenarios.test: cmd gt 0 && locked eq 0 && occupied eq 0

promptSpec:
Process point_move_permit(locked, occupied, cmd) -> (move, deny)

FSF specification:
if (locked gt 0) => move eq 0 && deny eq 2
if (occupied gt 0) => move eq 0 && deny eq 1
if (cmd gt 0 && locked eq 0 && occupied eq 0) => move eq 1 && deny eq 0
others => move eq 0 && deny eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Point (switch) move permit; lock/occupancy preempt command

name: atm_auth

fsfScenarios.test: pin_ok gt 0 && card_ok gt 0 && tries lt 3

promptSpec:
Process atm_auth(pin_ok, card_ok, tries) -> (auth, retain)

FSF specification:
if (card_ok eq 0) => auth eq 0 && retain eq 1
if (tries ge 3) => auth eq 0 && retain eq 1
if (pin_ok eq 0) => auth eq 0 && retain eq 0
if (pin_ok gt 0 && card_ok gt 0 && tries lt 3) => auth eq 1 && retain eq 0
others => auth eq 0 && retain eq 0

externalProvenance.section: ATM authentication FSF (book industrial example pattern)

name: atm_withdraw_pilot

fsfScenarios.test: auth gt 0 && amount gt 0 && amount le balance

promptSpec:
Process atm_withdraw_pilot(auth, balance, amount) -> (cash, status)

FSF specification:
if (auth eq 0) => cash eq 0 && status eq 2
if (amount le 0) => cash eq 0 && status eq 1
if (amount gt balance) => cash eq 0 && status eq 1
if (auth gt 0 && amount gt 0 && amount le balance) => cash eq 1 && status eq 0
others => cash eq 0 && status eq 0

name: hotel_book

fsfScenarios.test: vip gt 0 && rooms gt 0 && nights gt 0

promptSpec:
Process hotel_book(rooms, nights, vip) -> (booked, rate)

FSF specification:
if (rooms le 0) => booked eq 0 && rate eq 0
if (nights le 0) => booked eq 0 && rate eq 0
if (vip gt 0 && rooms gt 0 && nights gt 0) => booked eq 1 && rate eq 1
if (rooms gt 0 && nights gt 0) => booked eq 1 && rate eq 2
others => booked eq 0 && rate eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Hotel reservation SOFL application (Liu research applications list)

name: transfer_guard

fsfScenarios.test: amount gt 0 && amount le balance && amount le daily_left

promptSpec:
Process transfer_guard(balance, amount, daily_left) -> (ok, reason)

FSF specification:
if (amount le 0) => ok eq 0 && reason eq 1
if (amount gt balance) => ok eq 0 && reason eq 2
if (amount gt daily_left) => ok eq 0 && reason eq 3
if (amount gt 0 && amount le balance && amount le daily_left) => ok eq 1 && reason eq 0
others => ok eq 0 && reason eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Online banking transfer guards (published SOFL modelling case)

name: fraud_hold
promptSpec:
Process fraud_hold(risk, amount, new_device) -> (hold, challenge)

FSF specification:
if (risk ge 8) => hold eq 1 && challenge eq 2
if (new_device gt 0 && amount ge 5) => hold eq 1 && challenge eq 1
if (risk ge 5 && amount ge 8) => hold eq 1 && challenge eq 1
if (risk lt 5) => hold eq 0 && challenge eq 0
others => hold eq 0 && challenge eq 0

externalProvenance.section: Fraud hold priority over routine transfer clearance
